input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.2.3
            TITLE: all tractive system power must flow through the energy meter

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.2.3: All Tractive System power must flow through the Energy Meter
EV.3.2.3 All Tractive System power must flow through the Energy Meter

final_answer: All Tractive System power must flow through the Energy Meter
